title: CBN Announces Revised Documentation Requirements for PAPSS Transactions in Nigeria - FinancialEDGE
description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) is has announced a significant review of the documentation requirements for transactions conducted through the Pan-African Payment & Settlement System (PAPSS) in Nigeria. According to a statement signed by Hakama Sidi Ali (Mrs.) Ag. Director, Corporate Communications, this initiative is part of CBN’s ongoing commitment to foster seamless intra-African trade,
html: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) is has announced a significant review of the documentation requirements for transactions conducted through the Pan-African Payment & Settlement System (PAPSS) in Nigeria.
